name: Smartsheet Inc.
description: Smartsheet Inc. is a leading cloud-based platform for work execution, designed to help teams and organizations plan, capture, manage, automate, and report on work at scale. Founded in 2005 and headquartered in Bellevue, Washington, the company provides a versatile, enterprise-grade solution that enables users to streamline processes, improve collaboration, and achieve better business outcomes. Trusted by more than 85% of Fortune 500 companies, Smartsheet empowers individuals and teams to drive meaningful change and manage complex projects through its innovative, intelligent work management software.
